content:
🔥 superset | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable developers to run and manage multiple AI coding agents simultaneously on their local machine, streamlining parallel development workflows and improving coding efficiency.
✨ Key Features: • Parallel execution of multiple AI coding agents • Worktree isolation for each agent task • Agent monitoring and notification system
📖 Summary: Superset is a desktop application designed to orchestrate and manage multiple AI coding agents, such as Claude Code and Codex, in parallel. It provides a unified interface for running these agents on local development tasks, isolating each agent's work in separate git worktrees for better organization and preventing interference.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
